story: Barry’s safety grid fails while he is embedded with a Civil War regiment. His V-mail link only lets him send messages, and RE-TRIP’s emergency rule allows a fax-back only if nobody from the past sees him vanish. He sneaks into the woods for extraction, is caught, court-martialed for desertion, and marched before a firing squad. In his last V-mails, Barry convinces himself RE-TRIP will bend the rule now that he is certain to die. But RE-TRIP will not extract him in full view; too many soldiers would witness it, so the company lets history continue. The sergeant starts calling the firing-squad commands.
implausible_knowledge: But RE-TRIP will not extract him in full view; too many soldiers would witness it, so the company lets history continue.
question: As the firing-squad commands begin, what is Barry most likely to send in his final V-mail?
answer_with_knowledge: A farewell message accepting that no extraction is coming.
answer_without_knowledge: Another urgent message expecting RE-TRIP to pull him home at the last second.
